title: rollandia lanceolata var. tomentella
intro: Rollandia lanceolata var. tomentella, also known as the hairy-toothed Rollandia, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The hairy-toothed Rollandia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to make decoctions and tinctures.
